content.en:
Soon, the Lord of the Word of Darkness and the other Lords of the Legendary Realm of the True Void Holy Land arrived.

"Endless Lord, what did you call us to?

The Lord of the Word asked.

At this time, Ye Tian took out the fish from the black long river.

As soon as this fish appeared, the other Legendary Realm Lords were a little confused and didn't know this fish, but the Immortal Lord naturally knew it.

"Is this a fish from the Black River? Endless Lord, have you caught a fish?"

The Lord of the Word was taken aback.

"Yes!"

Ye Tian nodded.

Immediately, Ye Tian said again: "This fish is very delicious, and it also helps to temper the will, so I asked you to come ~ to taste it." "

The Lord of the Word of Darkness was overjoyed: "Hahaha, I really haven't eaten this kind of fish yet, but this time it's thanks to the Endless Lord, I must taste it well." -"

The Dragon Gu Lord was very confused, and couldn't help asking: "Endless Lord, Immortal Lord, what is the situation? Black River, fish, why can't we understand?"

So, Ye Tian explained: "There is a place in the Void Area, called Black Saint Mountain, only the Peak Legendary Realm Lord can enter, and there is a black long river in the Black Saint Mountain, this fish is the fish in the Black River, it is very difficult to catch this kind of fish, and many Peak Legendary Realm Lords can't catch a fish." This kind of fish can only be tasted by the Legendary Realm Lord, and the Legendary Lord is not qualified to taste it, otherwise he will inevitably die. This fish is incomparably delicious and tempers the will, and it is a delicacy that many Legendary Realm lords dream of. "

"I see!"

Lord Longgu and they understood, and they looked forward to it one by one.

Next, Ye Tian and the others cooked this fish, and everyone tasted it together.

The Legendary Realm Lords ate ordinary food, and they didn't feel it, and they couldn't stimulate their taste buds, but this time, the Legendary Realm Lords were extremely excited to eat.

Moreover, a mysterious force is refining their will.

For Ye Tian, the effect of refining is average, but for the Lord of the Legendary Realm, the effect of refining is very good.

The Lord of Longgu, the Lord of Frostless, and the Lord of Baiheng were immersed in the tempering of their wills one by one.

For them, food is secondary, but this kind of opportunity to quickly temper their will is rare, and every little improvement is a good choice.

Many Legendary Realm Lords tasted it slowly, and this fish was big enough, so they ate it for a long time before they ate this fish completely.

At this time, they were still unsatisfied and wanted to eat again.

"Endless Lord, when can we eat again, this fish is so beautiful. "Lord Longgu said.

Lord Yan said: "Lord Longgu, this kind of fish is extremely rare, even I can't get it, its value is enough for the Peerless Peak Legend Realm Lord to help out, how can you eat it if you want to?"

"Hahaha, it's okay, if I catch it next time, I'll give you one. Ye Tian said nothing.

Anyway, with his current strength, it's not really difficult to catch a fish.

When the time comes, it's a big deal to catch an extra fish and give it to these Legendary Realm Lords.

......

Black Holy Mountain, Black Long River.

Ye Tian came here again to fish, in order to hone his control of the power of time and space.

However, even if he reached the third level of the peak Legendary Realm Lord, it was not easy to catch a fish, because the black river was too big and endless, and the fish in it were not endless, and it would take time to find the fish.

Strength and luck are the keys to catching fish easily, and the reason why the Frontier Lord can easily catch fish is that he controls a space-time supreme skill that can specialize in fishing, and he can easily find those fish.

In order to fish, a special technique of fishing was created, and only the border lords who love fishing would do it.

Fishing, tempering, occasionally entering the magic circle to comprehend the fusion of time and space, and then with the help of the vision of the misty corridor, I can comprehend one or two.

In this way, hundreds of eternal epochs passed.

During this period, Ye Tian caught a lot of fish, several of which were given to the Legendary Realm Lords of the True Saintless Land, and the others went into his stomach.

I have to say that after eating so many fish, his willpower has improved a lot, but he is still far from the eighth-order will, and he has only improved a little in the seventh-order peak will.

If he eats all the fish in this long black river, maybe there is still hope to be promoted to the eighth order will, but that is not realistic at all.

"The Black Holy Mountain's sacrificial array is useless to me, no matter how much I comprehend, the effect is not great!"

"Even the occasional vision in the Misty Corridor is still a little useful to me, but basically it's not too useful. "

"We have to look for other opportunities to improve our strength quickly, otherwise our strength will stagnate for a long time. "

Ye Tian thought so.

However, the Void Area is such a treasure land as Black Sacred Mountain that is open and of great use to the Peak Legendary Realm Lord, and there is only such a place, and other treasures may be comparable, but they are all occupied by powerful top forces or powerful Peak Legendary Realm Lords, and they will not be easily let out.

"Let's first investigate the treasures in the Void Region that are of great use to the Peak Legendary Realm Lord. "

....... コ0，

Ye Tian came to the Time Merchant House of the Infinite Sea, and the Lord of Xinyang immediately came out to greet him.

"I've seen the Endless Lord!"

Lord Xinyang said extremely respectfully.

Once upon a time, Ye Tian was only a Legendary Lord of the Transcendence Realm, and he was a Legendary Realm Lord who was high above.

And now, Ye Tian was already the peak Legendary Realm Lord who resounded through the Void Region, far above him, and his strength had barely improved.

Thinking of this, Lord Xinyang felt extremely emotional in his heart.

"Lord Xinyang, I want to know about the treasure land of the Void Region, all the treasure land that is helpful to the peak Legendary Realm lord, give me a message, your time trading house should have such information. Ye Tian said.

"Yes, but almost all of these treasures have owners. "

Xinyang Lord said.

"I know. Ye Tian nodded, "But I still want to know the details." "

Lord Xinyang hurriedly said: "Endless Lord, I have contacted the headquarters, and the headquarters will send detailed information to the Endless Lord for free." "

"Thank you very much!"

Ye Tian accepted.

A peak Legendary Realm lord like him, even if it is a time firm, he has to be vigorously wooed.

In this era, the Time Merchant House is only five Peak Legendary Realm Lords, so any Peak Legendary Realm Lord, the Time Merchant House does not want to offend, and will be extremely polite

Soon, this piece of information was sent to Ye Tian's hands. _
